positive: Stylized abstract woodland creature portrait, featuring a playful fox and a wise owl perched on intertwined branches. The composition should be symmetrical and centered, using strong, clean silhouettes against a vibrant, minimalist forest backdrop. Use a limited color palette of deep teal, burnt orange, and forest green, rendered in a detailed graphic novel or linocut woodcut style. The focus must be on the intricate details of the animal fur and feathers, maintaining high contrast and a clean, solid print aesthetic. Perfect for T-shirt apparel.
